# pleasefindmethis.com

pleasefindmethis.com is a marketplace for hard-to-find items. Posters describe an item they cannot find, add reference photos, fund a finder payout, and let finders submit protected source links, seller contacts, local leads, or direct handoff options.

## Who It Serves

- Posters looking for discontinued products, sold-out goods, rare collectibles, replacement parts, vintage electronics, watches, home goods, art, decor, camera gear, or personal replacement items.
- Finders who know how to locate hard-to-source items and want to earn the posted payout for a valid source.

## Core Workflow

1. A poster creates a request with item details, must-have criteria, images, finder payout, and request duration.
2. The poster pays the finder payout plus platform and source review fees before the request goes live.
3. Finders submit source links, contacts, proof, terms, and notes as protected records.
4. The poster reveals, checks, and accepts a valid source or gives a clear rejection reason.
5. The saved request, source, reveal, review, and dispute trail is used for payout and refund decisions.

## Public Pages

- Homepage: https://pleasefindmethis.com/
- Browse featured requests: https://pleasefindmethis.com/browse
- Browse all requests: https://pleasefindmethis.com/browse/all
- FAQ: https://pleasefindmethis.com/faq
- Example trust profile: https://pleasefindmethis.com/profile
- Marketplace rules: https://pleasefindmethis.com/rules
- Refund policy: https://pleasefindmethis.com/refunds
- Terms: https://pleasefindmethis.com/terms
- Privacy: https://pleasefindmethis.com/privacy
- Support: https://pleasefindmethis.com/support
- Report abuse or unsafe activity: https://pleasefindmethis.com/report
- Pricing and fees: https://pleasefindmethis.com/pricing.md
- Fee details: https://pleasefindmethis.com/fees.md

## Important Facts

- pleasefindmethis.com is not the seller of requested items.
- The posted offer remains the finder payout.
- Posters pay platform service and source review fees at checkout.
- Protected source details are saved before reveal.
- Finder payouts can become payable after acceptance, confirmed handoff, or review resolution.
- Public browsing is open. Posting, submitting sources, dashboards, payments, and disputes require sign in.

## Contact

Support: support@pleasefindmethis.com
